gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students, clutching resumes inside branded folders, line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; meanwhile, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, with career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym, clutching resumes inside branded folders, before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule plays over the PA system, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while clutching resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and the students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, as dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
